value: {"schema_version": "1.2", "game_metadata": {"id": "fis11-kin-glber-001", "title": "Gerak Lurus Beraturan Explorer", "subtitle": "Memahami Konsep GLB Melalui Simulasi Interaktif", "grade_level": {"grid_color": "#E5E7EB", "line_color": "#3B82F6", "point_color": "#EF4444", "axis_color": "#6B7280"}}}, "educational_content": {"theory_explanation": {"definition": "Gerak Lurus Beraturan (GLB) adalah gerak suatu benda dengan lintasan lurus dan kecepatan tetap (konstan).", "key_formulas": ["v = s/t", "s = v × t", "t = s/v"], "characteristics": ["Lintasan berupa garis lurus", "Kecepatan tetap/konstan", "Percepatan nol (a = 0)", "Jarak tempuh sebanding dengan waktu"]}, "practice_questions": [{"question": "Sebuah mobil bergerak dengan kecepatan 20 m/s selama 10 detik. Berapa jarak yang ditempuh?", "options": ["100 m", "200 m", "300 m", "400 m"], "correct_answer": "200 m", "explanation": "s = v × t = 20 m/s × 10 s = 200 m"}, {"question": "Jika benda menempuh jarak 150 meter dalam waktu 30 detik, berapa kecepatannya?", "options": ["3 m/s", "5 m/s", "7 m/s", "10 m/s"], "correct_answer": "5 m/s", "explanation": "v = s/t = 150 m / 30 s = 5 m/s"}]}, "technical_requirements": {"minimum_screen_size": "768x500", "supported_browsers": ["Chrome", "Firefox", "Safari", "Edge"], "performance_metrics": {"frame_rate": "60fps", "render_time": "<16ms", "memory_usage": "<100MB"}}}
